phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy the boat ticket to the island
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on acheter les billets pour le bateau vers l'île Sainte-Marguerite ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TON ash-TAY lay bee-YAY poor leh bah-TOH vehr LEEL sant mar-geh-REET
phrases.cultural_note: Ferries to the Lérins islands depart from Cannes old port (Quai Laubeuf) — the crossing takes about 15 minutes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the cell of the Man in the Iron Mask is open to visit
phrases.text_local: La cellule du Masque de Fer au Fort Royal est-elle accessible aux visiteurs ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah seh-LYOOL doo MASK deh FEHR oh for rwah-YAL eh-TEL ak-se-SEEBL oh vee-zee-TUHR
phrases.cultural_note: The Man in the Iron Mask was held in Fort Royal for 11 years — his true identity remains unknown to this day.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long it takes to walk around the entire island
phrases.text_local: Combien de temps faut-il pour faire le tour de l'île à pied ?
phrases.pronunciation: kom-BYAN deh TAN foh-TEEL poor FEHR leh TOOR deh LEEL ah PYAY
phrases.cultural_note: A leisurely circuit of Île Sainte-Marguerite through its eucalyptus and pine forests takes about 2 hours.

responses.english: About an hour and a half.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a restaurant on the island
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un restaurant sur l'île où l'on peut déjeuner ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un res-to-RAN soor LEEL oo lon puh day-ZHUH-nay
phrases.cultural_note: A few seasonal restaurants and a snack bar operate on the island during summer — bring provisions if visiting off-season.

responses.english: Yes, a small restaurant near the fort.
responses.phonetic: wee, uhn puh-TEE res-toh-RAHN preh doo FOR
responses.french: Oui, un petit restaurant près du fort.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the snorkelling and swimming near the island
phrases.text_local: Peut-on faire de la plongée avec masque et tuba autour de l'île ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TON FEHR deh lah plon-ZHAY ah-VEK MASK ay too-BAH oh-TOOR deh LEEL
phrases.cultural_note: The clear waters around Sainte-Marguerite are excellent for snorkelling — the marine reserve protects rich sea life.

responses.english: There are coves on the south side.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah day KREEK soor luh koh-TAY SOOD
responses.french: Il y a des criques sur le côté sud.

vocabulary.word_local: la plongée avec masque et tuba
vocabulary.pronunciation: lah plon-ZHAY ah-VEK MASK ay too-BAH
